option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# sv
Everything you need to build a Svelte project, powered by [`sv`](https://github.com/sveltejs/cli).
## Creating a project
If you're seeing this, you've probably already done this step. Congrats!
```sh # create a new project npx sv create my-app ```
To recreate this project with the same configuration:
```sh # recreate this project npx sv@0.15.4 create --template minimal --types ts --add prettier eslint tailwindcss="plugins:typography,forms" --install npm ./ ```
## Developing
Once you've created a project and installed dependencies with `npm install` (or `pnpm install` or `yarn`), start a development server:
```sh npm run dev
# or start the server and open the app in a new browser tab npm run dev -- --open ```
## Building
To create a production version of your app:
```sh npm run build ```
You can preview the production build with `npm run preview`.
> To deploy your app, you may need to install an [adapter](https://svelte.dev/docs/kit/adapters) for your target environment.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# sv
Everything you need to build a Svelte project, powered by [`sv`](https://github.com/sveltejs/cli).
## Creating a project
If you're seeing this, you've probably already done this step. Congrats!
```sh # create a new project npx sv create my-app ```
To recreate this project with the same configuration:
```sh # recreate this project npx sv@0.15.4 create --template minimal --types ts --add prettier eslint tailwindcss="plugins:typography,forms" --install npm ./ ```
## Developing
Once you've created a project and installed dependencies with `npm install` (or `pnpm install` or `yarn`), start a development server:
```sh npm run dev
# or start the server and open the app in a new browser tab npm run dev -- --open ```
## Authentication
The app now includes:
- `Login` and `Register` screens - a clickable profile card in the sidebar that opens the account page - a logout button on the profile page
A demo account is pre-seeded for quick access:
- E-mail: `jan.kowalski@example.com` - Hasło: `test1234`
## Building
To create a production version of your app:
```sh npm run build ```
You can preview the production build with `npm run preview`.
> To deploy your app, you may need to install an [adapter](https://svelte.dev/docs/kit/adapters) for your target environment.

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
PASTA

Planer Studenta
JK
Jan Kowalski Grupa ARiIP - 111
{#each navItems as item} {item.label} {/each}
Rok akademicki 2025/2026 Semestr letni
{@render children()}

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
{#if isAuthRoute()}
{@render children()}
{:else}

PASTA

Planer Studenta
{currentUser?.avatar ?? 'JK'}
{currentUser?.name ?? 'Jan Kowalski'} {currentUser?.group ?? 'Grupa ARiIP - 111'}
{#each navItems as item} {item.label} {/each}
Rok akademicki 2025/2026 Semestr letni
{@render children()}
{/if}

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
Logowanie - PASTA
PASTA

Logowanie

Zaloguj się, aby przejść do swojego panelu.

{ event.preventDefault(); submit(); }}> {#if error}

{error}

{/if}
Nie masz konta? Zarejestruj się Demo: jan.kowalski@example.com / test1234

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
Profil - PASTA

Profil konta

Tu możesz sprawdzić informacje o swoim koncie i się wylogować.

{#if isReady && currentUser}
{currentUser.avatar}
{currentUser.name} {currentUser.group}
E-mail {currentUser.email}
Grupa {currentUser.group}
Avatar {currentUser.avatar}
Konto utworzone {new Date(currentUser.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('pl-PL')}
Wróć do dashboardu
{:else}

Ładowanie profilu...

{/if}

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
Rejestracja - PASTA
PASTA

Rejestracja

Załóż konto, aby korzystać z panelu studenta.

{ event.preventDefault(); submit(); }}> {#if error}

{error}

{/if}
Masz już konto? Zaloguj się
